description: Analyze the TCP capture file '200722_tcp_anon.pcapng' (located in ~/Documents/captures/) to measure the initial Round-Trip Time (RTT) for all successful TCP handshakes. Generate a CSV file at '~/Documents/captures/handshake_latencies.csv' with the header 'src_ip, dst_ip, src_port, dst_port, initial_rtt_seconds', ensuring each connection appears once and values are recorded in seconds. Additionally, create a summary text file at '~/Documents/captures/handshake_summary.txt' documenting the total number of connections, the minimum, maximum, and mean RTT in milliseconds, and the source IP, destination IP, and destination port of the slowest connection.
